description: Level maze generation parameters - room counts, dimensions, and merge behavior per level and difficulty.

Level.description: Level ID this maze definition applies to

Rooms.description: Number of rooms in the maze (Normal)

Rooms(N).description: Number of rooms in the maze (Nightmare)

Rooms(H).description: Number of rooms in the maze (Hell)

SizeX.description: Horizontal size of the maze in tiles

SizeY.description: Vertical size of the maze in tiles

Merge.description: Whether adjacent maze rooms merge together
